microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict compliance controls.
Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring execution cycles to reduce planning time by 39% and increase annual drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Authored architecture-level documentation and runbooks for partner integrations across Databricks, SAP, and NetApp, enabling **trusted-advisor engagements** with enterprise stakeholders on resilience posture and risk reduction.

Drove product direction by translating field findings from 45+ drills into prioritized Engineering and PM roadmap inputs, **consolidating operational risk** signals into actionable platform improvements.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across Azure, conducting technical demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by leading **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer requirements into prioritized PM deliverables.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ service teams.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, running **discovery across 20+ teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical execution paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and benchmark consolidation progress quarter-over-quarter.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping platform dependencies across 1,200+ stations — a direct analog to SEG displacement planning.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional IT, Ops, and Engineering stakeholders.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoff risk during platform transitions.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM process that reduced proposal turnaround time and improved pipeline visibility.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for targeted demand generation.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that directly increased net profitability on recurring accounts.

tailoring_notes: 'SEG displacement' (JD core term) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#7 and amazon_robotics bullet#1 to directly mirror Abnormal's primary use case.
'Trusted-advisor' (JD must-have) surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#6 framing enterprise stakeholder engagement as advisory-level relationship building.
'Architecture-level' (JD what-you-will-do) used in microsoft_ft bullet#6 to map Azure partner integration documentation work to Abnormal's architecture-level customer conversations.
'Risk reduction' and 'operational consolidation' (JD business case language) embedded in microsoft_ft bullet#1 and bullet#7 to mirror how Abnormal expects SAs to frame customer value.
'Discovery' (JD strong discovery skills requirement) explicitly called out in microsoft_2022 bullet#2 and microsoft_ft bullet#7 to demonstrate the hunter/discovery mindset Abnormal requires.
'Compliance controls' (JD regulatory/GDPR/HIPAA requirement) surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#4 via the sovereign-cloud/enterprise contract context to signal compliance depth.
